subcodes.title: Du’a’ li-Ithbati’l-ithbat
subcodes.first_line: O God! I beseech Thee by Thy Firstness, which verily transcendeth all things, to elevate every being possessing the letter Alif that is associated with the Tree of Affirmation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. اللهم انی اسئلک باولیتک التی انها هی ممتنعة فوق کل شیء ان ترفعن کل ذات الف ینسب الی شجرة الاثبات
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
